channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US Iran War Live: Crew Rescued After US Helicopter Goes Down Near Hormuz

media:content.media:description: West Asia War, US-Iran-Israel War Live Updates

item.description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: Iran closed the airspace around Tehran's Imam Khomeini International Airport, the country's main airfield, after the Israeli attack.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War LIVE Updates: Iran closed the airspace around Tehran's Imam Khomeini International Airport, the country's main airfield, after the Israeli attack.

item.title: Killing The Mood: Smartphones Reduce Birth Rate, Say Studies

media:content.media:description: "Is the iPhone Birth Control?" asked a paper published by the National Bureau of Economic Research.

item.description: As governments around the world struggle with ways to reverse plunging birth rates, new US studies suggest they have ignored a...
item.content:encoded: As governments around the world struggle with ways to reverse plunging birth rates, new US studies suggest they have ignored a...

item.title: Video: Tourist Jumps Into Rushing Water Below 262-Foot Waterfall To Save Phone

media:content.media:description: Video shows the man getting close to the deadly drop.

item.description: The man was not identified, and no serious injuries were reported, but the incident drew reactions online.
item.content:encoded: The man was not identified, and no serious injuries were reported, but the incident drew reactions online.

item.title: "In Spirit Of Friendship": Israel To Install Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj's Statue In A 'Big' City

media:content.media:description: Fadnavis has vowed to extend his full support for the initiative.

item.description: Revach said that to make the memorial worthy of Shivaji's legacy, Israel has sought cooperation from Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis regarding historical references, artistic consultation, and design considerations, and "he immediately a
item.content:encoded: Revach said that to make the memorial worthy of Shivaji's legacy, Israel has sought cooperation from Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis regarding historical references, artistic consultation, and design considerations, and "he immediately a

item.title: United Nations Warns Of 'Deepening Crisis' In Oceans, Urges Action

media:content.media:description: Oceans play a critical role for the planet, regulating the climate and feeding billions of people.

item.description: Oceans are in a "deepening crisis" that demands urgent global action, a major UN report warned Monday, with seas warming and rising faster, ice cover shrinking...
item.content:encoded: Oceans are in a "deepening crisis" that demands urgent global action, a major UN report warned Monday, with seas warming and rising faster, ice cover shrinking...

item.title: How An Ex-CIA Officer Allegedly Used A Secret Loophole To Collect $40 Million In Gold

media:content.media:description: David Rush was arrested after the FBI raided his Auburn, Virginia, home May 18.

item.description: A former CIA officer has been accused of exploiting a classified intelligence loophole to allegedly obtain $40 million in gold bars. The case has sparked concerns about oversight, secrecy and accountability within America's intelligence community.
item.content:encoded: A former CIA officer has been accused of exploiting a classified intelligence loophole to allegedly obtain $40 million in gold bars. The case has sparked concerns about oversight, secrecy and accountability within America's intelligence community.

item.title: "Lovers' Spat": Israeli Envoy On Trump's Iran Ultimatum To Netanyahu

media:content.media:description: Netanyahu said he told Trump that "Israel has a full right to self-defence".

item.description: Trump, who has reportedly grown increasingly exasperated with Netanyahu, had earlier urged both Israel and Iran to stop "shooting" and said that "final negotiations" towards peace would proceed "subject to ignorance or stupidity getting in its way"
item.content:encoded: Trump, who has reportedly grown increasingly exasperated with Netanyahu, had earlier urged both Israel and Iran to stop "shooting" and said that "final negotiations" towards peace would proceed "subject to ignorance or stupidity getting in its way"

item.title: 'Bibi, You Will Be On Your Own': Trump Warns Netanyahu Over Renewed Iran War
item.description: US President Donald Trump told Axios in an interview published on Monday that he warned Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu that he might find himself fighting alone if he went back to war with Iran.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump told Axios in an interview published on Monday that he warned Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu that he might find himself fighting alone if he went back to war with Iran.

item.title: 4 Killed, 10 Injured In Russian Strikes On Ukraine's Kharkiv Region

media:content.media:description: At least 15,850 civilians have been killed in Ukraine since Russia launched its invasion in 2022.

item.description: Russian strikes killed four people and wounded 10 others in Ukraine's northeastern Kharkiv region, its governor said early Tuesday.
item.content:encoded: Russian strikes killed four people and wounded 10 others in Ukraine's northeastern Kharkiv region, its governor said early Tuesday.

item.title: Nuclear Arms Spending Hits Record High, China Leads Global Expansion

media:content.media:description: The report voiced alarm at the growing nuclear risk amid swelling geopolitical tensions.

item.description: The United States and Russia together hold around 83 percent of the world's nuclear arms stockpile, with more than 5,000 warheads each.
item.content:encoded: The United States and Russia together hold around 83 percent of the world's nuclear arms stockpile, with more than 5,000 warheads each.

item.title: Trump Nominates Former Personal Lawyer As Attorney General

media:content.media:description: Todd Blanche has been serving as acting attorney general since Pam Bondi departed in April.

item.description: Blanche, 51, has been serving as acting attorney general since Pam Bondi departed in April. Since then he has pursued a number of indictments against Trump's political enemies.
item.content:encoded: Blanche, 51, has been serving as acting attorney general since Pam Bondi departed in April. Since then he has pursued a number of indictments against Trump's political enemies.

item.title: At UN, India Slams Pak's Afghanistan Airstrikes As "Massacre"

media:content.media:description: Ambassador Parvathaneni accused Islamabad of running "an organised factory of hate".

item.description: India called for full compliance with international humanitarian law, including the principles of precaution, distinction, and proportionality, and backed UNAMA's demand for independent investigations to ensure accountability.
item.content:encoded: India called for full compliance with international humanitarian law, including the principles of precaution, distinction, and proportionality, and backed UNAMA's demand for independent investigations to ensure accountability.

item.title: 6.1-Magnitude Earthquake Hits Cuba, Tremors Felt in Florida

media:content.media:description: The tremors was also felt as far away as Florida. (Representational)

item.description: A 6.1 magnitude earthquake struck near western Cuba on Monday, shaking buildings in Havana and beyond.
item.content:encoded: A 6.1 magnitude earthquake struck near western Cuba on Monday, shaking buildings in Havana and beyond.

item.title: Netanyahu Gambles Close Trump Ties With Fresh Iran Strikes

media:content.media:description: The Israeli military said that its chief of staff was "in close contact" with his US counterpart.

item.description: Iran War: Following Israeli strikes on Beirut's southern suburbs, Iran responded with a barrage of missiles towards Israel, where some officials in turn called for a relentless response.
item.content:encoded: Iran War: Following Israeli strikes on Beirut's southern suburbs, Iran responded with a barrage of missiles towards Israel, where some officials in turn called for a relentless response.

item.title: Trump's $100,000 H-1B Visa Fee Law Struck Down, Judge Says It's "Unlawful"

media:content.media:description: The increase in fees has discouraged H-1B visa requests.

item.description: Donald Trump's $100,000 H-1B Visa Fee 'Unlawful', US Federal Judge Rules
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump's $100,000 H-1B Visa Fee 'Unlawful', US Federal Judge Rules

item.title: Israel And Iran Halt Attacks On Each Other, But Not Before Issuing Warnings

media:content.media:description: No casualties have been reported in eitherIsraelorIranafterthe exchange of fire.

item.description: Tehran launched missiles at Israel on Sunday over its on going war against Hezbollah in Lebanon, which prompted Israel to strike back.
item.content:encoded: Tehran launched missiles at Israel on Sunday over its on going war against Hezbollah in Lebanon, which prompted Israel to strike back.

item.title: Great White Shark Filmed In Mediterranean Sea For The First Time Ever: "My Fingers Were Trembling"

media:content.media:description: The incredible sighting took place in the Strait of Sicily, between Italy and Tunisia.

item.description: This rare sighting is believed to be the first time the predator has been filmed underwater in the Mediterranean sea.
item.content:encoded: This rare sighting is believed to be the first time the predator has been filmed underwater in the Mediterranean sea.

item.title: What Forced Nearly 100 Schools To Shut In Japan? A Bear

media:content.media:description: The animal was spotted multiple times across Utsunomiya (AI Generated Image)

item.description: A bear roaming the streets of a Japanese city for three days forced authorities to shut nearly 100 schools on Monday as hunters, police and local officials launched a major search operation.
item.content:encoded: A bear roaming the streets of a Japanese city for three days forced authorities to shut nearly 100 schools on Monday as hunters, police and local officials launched a major search operation.

item.title: 100 Days Of War, 60 Days Of Fragile Peace. It All Fell Apart In 24 Hours

media:content.media:description: On the ground in Tehran, the mood on Monday morning reflected exhaustion and fear.

item.description: As Israel and Iran traded blows, the wider regional fallout was immediate. Iraq's Civil Aviation Authority announced a 72-hour closure of Iraqi airspace in response to the renewed attacks.
item.content:encoded: As Israel and Iran traded blows, the wider regional fallout was immediate. Iraq's Civil Aviation Authority announced a 72-hour closure of Iraqi airspace in response to the renewed attacks.

item.title: NASA Goes Luxe With Prada Spacesuits For Artemis 4 Moon Landing

media:content.media:description: Luxury brands have long drawn inspiration from space travel.

item.description: The new product follows Prada's splashy foray into space fashion in 2024 with the unveiling of a spacesuit that is expected to be used for NASA's anticipated Artemis 4 moon landing in 2028.
item.content:encoded: The new product follows Prada's splashy foray into space fashion in 2024 with the unveiling of a spacesuit that is expected to be used for NASA's anticipated Artemis 4 moon landing in 2028.
